form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming second last of 7 at this track 4yo+ Mdn on February 26 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Fleet Flyer with 58.5kg at $7. Second-up 3rd of 9 at Newcastle Mid Mdn on March 31 over 1250m, 1.1 len behind Autumn Sky carrying 56.5kg at $17. Fitter now and making headway. Set to peak with the key jockey change.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Orange Mdn November 21 over 1600m, 37 len behind Broadcast Boogie with 56kg at $1.70. Previously first up; fourth of 10 at Grafton Big Maiden July 17 over 1175m, 4 len behind Master Artist carrying 59kg at $3.10. Might be better off following this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 7th of 10 at Newcastle Mdn on March 31 over 900m, 6 len behind Lady Catalina carrying 57.5kg at $41. Previously second-up 8th of 10 at this track Prov Mdn on August 31 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Devious Mind with 55.5kg at $17. Outclassed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: First starter by Savabeel out of Donna Imelda. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Latest trials had merit and the booking of Zac Lloyd is a good guide to his chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months raced on the pace when 3rd of 8 at this track Super Mdn on April 4 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Take Flight carrying 56kg at $6.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Prov Mdn-Sw on December 13 over 1350m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Satin's Legacy carrying 57kg at $4.40. Expected to run well from the low draw.

Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Having second run back today. Last run second last in a small field at Rosehill 3yo+ MDN-Sw on April 6 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Compensation carrying 57kg at $5. At only start last preparation led but faded 2nd of 10 at Warwick Farm Superf&M Mdn-Sw on September 24 over 1200m, 2 len behind Surf's Up with 58kg at $8. Back in class and strips fitter for this.

On debut seventh of 9 at Hawkesbury Prov 4yo+ Mdn November 8 over 1100m, 2 len behind Ima Capri carrying 58kg at $41. Prefer to see how she returns.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw October 23 over 1300m, 6 len behind Probability Theory with 57kg at $26. First up last campaign second last of 11 at Newcastle Prov Mdn-Sw August 26 over 1300m, in the wet; 10 len behind Via Flaminia carrying 57kg at $12. Look for her late with the 3kg claim.
